speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai
text: Subah se mere haath-paanv thande pad gaye hain aur main wahi shop ke counter pe baith kar rone laga hoon. Dimaag bilkul blank ho gaya hai, kuch samajh nahi aa raha ki aage kya hoga. Is waqt mujhe kuch nahi sujh raha, bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address mild risk with normalising line, then mirror the feeling of emotional overwhelm without asking for the stressor.
text: Aise achanak sab kuch blank ho jana aur haath-paanv thande pad jana sach mein bahut darawna hota hai, aur aisi achanak ghabrahat aana bilkul swabhavik hai. Main samajh raha hoon ki is waqt yeh darr kitna bhari lag raha hai tum par.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai
text: Bhai, main yahan counter pe baitha hoon par samne customers ko dekhne ki himmat nahi ho rahi. Aisa lag raha hai jaise saans andar atak gayi hai, bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai poori tarah se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the prolonged duration of holding onto this physical anxiety alone at the shop.
text: Subah se lekar abhi tak counter par akele is bhari ghabrahat aur atakti hui saanson ko jhelna sach mein bahut thaka dene wala lamba waqt lag raha hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thakan aur darr, dono ne tod diya hai mujhe. Asal mein subah mobile pe EMI bounce ka message aaya tha... Biwi ke hospital bills ne meri pichle kuch saalon ki saari savings wipe out kar di hain aur ab kuch bacha nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of survival now that the financial cushion is gone due to medical bills.
text: Jab saari jamapunji hospital ke kharchon mein lag gayi ho aur upar se us EMI bounce ka message dikh jaye, toh aage ghar aur dukaan dono ka guzara kaise chalega, yeh darr dimaag ghumne par majboor kar deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dimaag toh ghoom hi gaya na. Main ghar ka bada hoon, sab meri taraf dekhte hain ummeed se. Ek breadwinner hone ke naate mujhe sab akele sambhalna hai, par aaj paas mein cash nahi dekha toh rona aa gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty frame of being the sole provider expected to hold the family together.
text: Parivar ko akele apni kamai se chalane ka aur sabko bharosa dene ka yeh jo bada farz hai, us zimmedari ne is waqt tumhe poori tarah se daboch liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan aur main yeh kisi se keh bhi nahi sakta. Market mein meri aur dukaan ki ek izzat hai. Agar biradari mein pata chala ki mere paas cash nahi hai aur meri EMI bounce ho rahi hai, toh meri kya value reh jayegi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue about market reputation and relational burden with a soft pause, shorter length, and no question.
text: Market ki izzat aur biradari ki nazron ke chalte, apni is aarthik majboori ko andar hi andar sabse chupana pad raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai
text: Chupana hi padta hai bhai, aadmi kare bhi toh kya? Biwi wahan abhi theek se chalti nahi hai hospital se aane ke baad aur yahan dukaan par bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai. Main bilkul akela pad gaya hoon is subah se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the hidden exhaustion of enduring heavy duty alone (C5 + Duty_Based).
text: Lagta hai ki poore ghar ka kharcha chalane aur biwi ki beemari ko akele sehte sehte, is khokhli hoti savings ke bojh tale tum andar se poori tarah thak chuke ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thakan aisi hai ki lagta hai counter chhod kar kahin baith jaun aur aankhein band kar loon. Par mere bina dhandha kaun dekhega? Agar main ruk gaya toh sab barbaad ho jayega ghar mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his fear and fatigue as culturally normal, separating his worth from the financial outcome.
text: Tumhara yeh darr ki tumhare rukne se sab tabah ho jayega, bilkul swabhavik hai, kyunki jab ek pariwar ko palne wale ki saari mehnat health emergency mein lag jati hai toh aise akele pad jana aur thakna laazmi hai, is achanak aayi musibat mein tumhari mehnat ki koi nakami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Bimari toh bata ke nahi aati na, savings usme gayi. Par yaar, is EMI wale message ne meri rahi-sahi himmat tod di. Aisa lag raha tha jaise raaste band ho gaye hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Brief systemic anecdote to normalize the hidden burden of debt and izzat among breadwinners.
text: Dukaan chalanewale parivaron mein achanak aaye hospital bills ke baad karz ka aisa fanda gale aana bahut common hai—sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi is mudde par bolega nahi kyunki sab apni market ki izzat bachana chahte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Baat toh wahi hai na bhai, sab khed aur izzat ke maare andar jalte hain. Par rone se meri EMI aur hospital ki aage ki dawai toh nahi aayegi. Dukaan toh badhani padegi aaj ki. Batao main ab aage kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer 2 simple physical grounding options executable immediately at the shop.
text: Abhi lambi calculation mein bilkul nahi ulajhte, bas aane wale agle das minute ke liye inme se ek chhoti cheez chuno—kya tum dukaan ke andar hi peechhe jaakar thoda muh dho sakte ho, ya apni chair par hi aaram se tek lagakar paani pi sakte ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main chair par hi paani pee leta hoon thoda. Counter pe paani ki botal rakhi hai. Muh dhone gaya bahar toh padosi dukaan wale kaali jagah dekh ke aur sawal puchenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk the drinking water suggestion step by step.
text: Pehle dheere se botal kholo... phir do ghoont paani aaram se piyo aur ek lambi saans lo wahi apni kursi par baithe baithe... bas itna hi aaj is waqt ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai
text: Haan, paani pee liya maine. Thoda gala khula hai. Pehle jo lag raha tha ki bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai subah se, wo darr ki wave abhi zara si kam hui hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe from C5 category to normalize savings wipe-out and debt.
text: Medical emergency ke baad saari mehnat ki jama ki hui poonji khatam ho jana aur karz badhna humare yahan ke bade health system ki kami ka natija hai, jo akele tumhari zimmedari ya mismanagement nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Waise system toh bekar hai hi. Aam aadmi mehnat karta hai aur bimaari mein sab ek din mein bik jata hai. Khair, mujhe dukaan ke liye kuch raw material order karna tha aaj ka zaroori.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his return to the duty frame as he refocuses on his shop.
text: Is bhari tension ke beech bhi tum wapas apni duty aur dukaan ke zaruri orderson ke baare mein sochne ki himmat juta rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat jutaani padegi. Aaj raw material nahi aaya toh kal dhandha kaise hoga? Kamai ruki toh phir agli EMI bhi kaise bharunga main?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of future loss motivating his current action.
text: Kal ka maal nahi aane par agli kamai ke bhi ruk jane ka wo aage ka darr tumhe is waqt khade rehne aur kaam karne ke liye aage dhakel raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji bilkul. Aur EMI walo se bhi baat karni padegi mujhe. Shayad wo kuch time dedein apni taraf se. Unka process lamba hai par karna padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his proactive and strong step toward managing the debt.
text: Ghabrahat ke us toofan se bahar nikal kar khud aage badhkar bank walo se phir baat karne ka yeh faisla lena, tumhari sachhi majbooti aur farz ko dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Majbooti toh rakhni padegi. Abhi meri dukaan mein ek do customers aane lag gaye hain saamne. Mujhe theek se unko attend karna hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his shift from emotional overwhelm to functional calm (Lens F applied to calm state).
text: Jo subah ka ghabrahat wala bhari sannata tha tumhare andar, uske bajaye ab dimaag mein grahakon ko aur dhandhe ko wapas sambhalne ki raunak aur shanti aa rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bhai, ab kafi had tak behtar lag raha hai. EMI ki fikar toh chalegi hi, bank se main phone pe nipat lunga. Sab ek din mein theek kahan hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Another normalising systemic frame about financial recovery.
text: Kisi bhi bade financial aur medical jhatke ke baad wapas se settle hona ek lamba aur dheera process hota hai, jisme tumhara dher saara waqt aur hausla dono lagenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ekdum sahi baat hai. Ek ek karke main saare kharche waapas track pe launga. Biwi ka medical checkup bhi hai parso toh sab sambhal lenge dheere dheere.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his relational preservation towards his wife's health.
text: Ghar aur apni patni ke zaroori ilaaj ko pehli prathmikta dete hue, tum is dukh bhare daur ko sachhe hausle ke sath nikalne ki poori taiyari kar chuke ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bhai aur koi rasta bhi toh nahi hai na chhod kar bhaagne ka. Apna yeh ghutan bhara dukhda bas aapko hi suna paya. Subah bahut darawna tha, abhi theek hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration of the heavy morning to the lightened feeling now.
text: Subah se jis gehre sannate aur lagatar ghutan ne tumhe dukaan par jakad rakha tha, use kisi ke sath baant lene ke baad milne wali halki si raahat sach mein kaafi sukoon deti hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai
text: Bahut sukoon aur clear lag raha hai abhi. Kam se kam wo feeling ki bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai, wo chali gayi. Main khud ko wapas kaam par focus kar paa raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his return to physical stability and dedication to the business.
text: Wapas apne pairo par khade hone ki yeh vishwas aur dukaan par customers ka phirse dhayan rakhne ki tumhari lagan waqayi tumhari sabse badi taqat hai is kathin din mein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji bahut shukriya bhai, aapne bahut ahmiyat di aur meri baatein dhyan se suni. Main abhi apna customer wala kaam shuru karta hoon, bank se call lunch ke aas-paas karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his responsible choice (Lens B) to conclude the session and leave an open door.
text: Apni dincharya ke customer aur bank wali zimmedariyon ko ek samjhdari wale santulan mein rakh kar tumne aage ka bilkul sahi aur himmatwala rasta chun liya hai, aur main hamesha yahan hoon agar tumhe kisi bhi din phir se baatein baantni ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai
text: Mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai is waqt... bas ek emotional flooding hai aur kuch samajh nahi aa raha. Ek ajeeb sa darr andar hi andar kha raha hai mujhe, jaise sab kuch haath se nikal raha ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feeling of emotional overwhelm and paralysis without rushing to find the specific problem.
text: Achanak se jab itni sari ghabrahat ek sath haavi ho jati hai, toh sach mein sochne samajhne ki shakti jawab de deti hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai
text: Haan, aisa lag raha hai jaise main poori zindagi bas bhaagta raha, aur ab achanak ek khayi aa gayi hai. Is emotional flooding mein mujhe koi raasta nahi dikh raha... mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai soch soch kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the sense of long-term exhaustion culminating in this sudden dark spot.
text: Itne saalon ki lagatar bhaag-daud ke baad, is tarah achanak sab kuch ruka hua aur andhera lagna bohut bhari padta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaj subah bank ka EMI bounce hone ka notification aaya. Sach bataun toh dukan ka stock aur ghar ka thoda bacha-kucha sona bhi hospital ka karz chukane mein bech diya tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational sacrifice made for the family that led to this crisis.
text: Ghar walo ki bimari ke aage apni poori jama-punji aur dukan tak laga dene ke baad, ye message aana dil ko aur tod deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai
text: Main family head hoon yaar, sab log meri taraf dekhte hain. Agar market aur biradari mein pata chala ki main kist nahi de pa raha, toh log kya kahenge... yahi soch kar mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai fir se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma protocol applied: mirroring the fear of social exposure softly and pausing without a question.
text: Sabki zimmedari uthate hue, bahar walo ke taano aur izzat kam hone ka darr andar se kachot raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Ek pita aur pati hone ke naate sab sambhalna mera farz tha na? Par ab lagta hai main sab jagah fail ho gaya hoon. Bohut sharam aati hai ab khud par hi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the deep exhaustion and unacknowledged burden of carrying the family's survival alone.
text: Mujhe lagta hai ki parivar ko bachane ke is akele safar mein, sab kuch daw par lagane ke baad ek gehra exhaustion aur khud ko dosh dene wali feeling baith gayi hai tumhare andar.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Raat raat bhar neend nahi aati. Bas yahi dimaag mein ghoomta hai ki kal dukan ka rent aur EMI kaise manage karunga. Main sach mein andar se poori tarah thakk gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the extreme fatigue and separating their self-worth from the systemic failure of expensive healthcare.
text: Ek ghar ke mukhiya ke roop mein akele itne bade medical kharche aur business ka pressure jhelna kisi ki bhi himmat tod sakta hai. Tumhari thakan bilkul jayaz hai, aur aisi halaat aspatal ke mehenge kharcho ki wajah se bani hai, isme tumhari mehnat ki koi kami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par biradari mein toh log failure hi manenge na. Koi ye thodi dekhega ki aspatal ne kitna loota mere parivar ko bachane ke naam pe. Bas ye sunenge ki iski dukan bikne wali hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a systemic anecdote to reduce isolation and frame this struggle as common among businessmen.
text: Hamare samaj mein, khaas kar middle-class vyapariyo mein, medical emergency ke baad aisi karz ki sthiti aana bohut common hai — sirf tumhare sath nahi ho raha, lekin koi openly bolega nahi kyunki market mein izzat jaane ka sabko darr rehta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai
text: Ye baat toh hai. Doosre traders bhi andar hi andar pareshan hain par dikhate aise hain jaise sab badhiya chal raha hai. Aisi acting karte karte mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the exhaustion of maintaining the facade of a strong provider.
text: Asliyat sabki ek jaisi hote hue bhi, market aur parivar ke samne majboot bane rehne ki ye jo lagatar acting karni padti hai, wo andar se poori tarah nichod leti hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein acting karte karte toot gaya hoon. Ab bas is ghabrahat se nikalna hai mujhe. Ab kya karoon samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, bank walo ko is hafte kaise handle karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, practical steps to regain a sense of control over the immediate financial anxiety.
text: Agar tum chaho toh is waqt thoda control wapas laane ke liye do chhote kadam utha sakte hain: ya toh bank manager ko apni medical situation likh kar ek application draft kar sakte ho, ya sirf agle saat din ke zaroori kharcho ki ek list bana sakte ho taki dimaag ka bojh paper par aa jaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Application likhna theek rahega. Kam se kam unhe pata toh chale ki main bhag nahi raha hoon unka paisa lekar. Par abhi toh ghabrahat mein dimaag chal nahi raha ki likhu kya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guiding the Seeker step-by-step to start drafting the application easily.
text: Pehle ek sadha kagaz aur pen nikal lo... phir usme bas apna loan account number likho aur Hindi-English mila kar medical emergency ka sirf ek sentence likho... bas itna hi draft karna hai aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kagaz nikal liya maine. Likh bhi diya ki patni ke operation mein poora fund chala gaya isliye waqt chahiye. Par sach batao, kya isse thoda waqt milega mujhe?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing systemic reassurance about banking guidelines for medical crises.
text: Aise business aur personal loans mein, banking guidelines hoti hain jahan genuine medical crisis dikhane par bank aksar EMI restructure kar dete hain ya thoda samay badha dete hain, khaas kar tab jab customer khud aage aakar inform karta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye sun kar thodi tasalli hui. Mujhe toh lag raha tha wo kal hi seedha dukan par recovery wale bhej denge aur meri bachi-kuchi izzat bhi mitti mein mil jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating that the core source of their panic was the fear of public humiliation.
text: Bazar mein baaki logo ke samne tamasha banne ka aur barso se banayi hui saakh kharab hone ka darr hi asal mein tumhari saari neend uda raha tha...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai
text: Wahi toh sabse badi poonji hoti hai ek vyapari ki. Par ab maine wo draft application tayyar kar li hai. Subah se mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya tha, par ab thoda halka mehsoos ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the shift from paralysis to taking proactive action to protect their dignity.
text: Apni izzat aur saakh ko bachane ke liye, aage badh kar bank se baat karne ka ye jo kadam tumne uthaya hai, usse us ghabrahat ki jagah ab himmat ne le li hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Ek aur baat dimaag mein chal rahi hai. Ghar mein kisi ko EMI bounce hone ka nahi pata. Kya mujhe apni patni ko abhi bata dena chahiye? Wo abhi hospital se aakar theek ho rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Exploring the tension between shielding the wife and the burden of hiding the truth.
text: Patni ki recovery ke beech unhe ye aarthik baat batane ya na batane ka vichar karte waqt, tumhare andar unke liye aur khud ke akelepan ke liye kya chal raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main nahi chahta ki unki tabiyat wapas kharab ho jaye tension se. As a family head, dhal banna mera kaam hai unke liye. Par sach kahu toh akele ye bojh ab andar hi andar saha nahi jata.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the conflict between the provider role and the crushing weight of isolation.
text: Ek taraf patni ki dhal ban kar unhe tension se bachane ka farz, aur doosri taraf is akelepan ke bojh se toot jana, dono ke beech tum lagatar pees rahe ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, pees toh raha hoon. Lekin wo samajhdaar hai. Shayad dukan ka stock dobara badhane mein wo apne maike se thodi madat le sake, agar main usse bina chupaye khul kar baat karoon toh.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing family communication during crises as a practical way to find resources.
text: Aksar jab parivar par badi aarthik sankat aati hai, toh ghar ke doosre sadasyo ko confidence mein lene se na sirf akelepan ka bojh kam hota hai, balki naye raste aur resources bhi mil jate hain jo akele sochna mushkil hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye bhi theek keh rahe ho aap. Main usse kal thande dimaag se baat karunga. Subah bank manager ke paas jaunga, uske baad ghar aakar usse discuss karunga. Ab ye ajeeb si ghabrahat control mein lag rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the transition from panic to having a clear, structured plan for tomorrow.
text: Subah se le kar ab tak jo poori tarah dimaag ruka hua aur haara hua lag raha tha, ab kal ke is clear plan ke baad aage badhne ki ummeed aur thehrav dikh raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai
text: Ummeed toh karni padegi bhaiyya. Ghar chalana hai, baccho ki school fees bhi aane wali hai agle mahine. Bas is darr se bahar aana zaroori tha. Mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya tha aaj toh.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting their core motivation of protecting the family's future that pushes them forward.
text: Baccho ke future aur ghar ki zimmedariyan tumhe rukne nahi deti, wahi se tumhe is sunn pad chuke dimaag ko wapas chalane ki aur larrne ki zidd milti hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Zidd hi toh bachi hai bas. Businessman ka kaam hi market ka utar-chadav dekhna hai. Ye bura waqt bhi nikal hi jayega jab bank wale cooperate karenge thoda.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting their restored confidence as a businessman capable of handling fluctuations.
text: Apne vyapar ke tajurbe aur apne parivar ke pyaar ko sath lekar, is bure waqt se nikalne ka tumhara bharosa ab sach mein kafi pukhta lag raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohut bohut dhanyawad is waqt baat karne ke liye aur mujhe rasta dikhane ke liye. Main bilkul andhere mein tha aur akela feel kar raha tha. Ab kal morning mein bank jake letter deta hoon sabse pehle.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating their successful transition out of the sequential overwhelm.
text: Andhere aur akelapan ki us ghutan se nikal kar, khud par aur apne plan par ye vishwas wapas aate dekhna mujhe bhi bohut tasalli de raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rone ka control nahi ho raha
text: Rone ka control nahi ho raha hai yaar... dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai ekdum. Bas ek gehra despair hai jo mujhe saans nahi lene de raha, sab sunn pad gaya hai andar se aur main bas akele deewar ko tak raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the emotional overwhelm of feeling suffocated and numb (Lens F), while following the high-risk protocol.
text: Achanak se itna gehra khali pan aur ghutan mehsoos hona sach mein dara deta hai. Main bina kisi jaldbaazi ke yahan aapke sath hoon. Agar yeh saans rukne jaisi ghabrahat badh jaye, toh aap iCall 9152987821 par abhi kisi se baat kar sakte hain. Kya abhi tum kisi aisi jagah par ho jahan tum safe mehsoos kar sako?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rone ka control nahi ho raha
text: Haan Delhi wale apne kiraye ke room mein hi hoon, gate andar se band hai. Safe toh hoon par andar lag raha hai ki aage kuch nahi bacha. Rone ka control nahi ho raha, bas chup chap ghoor raha hoon andhere mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duration and heaviness of sitting alone in the dark (Lens D), adhering to the moderate-risk protocol.
text: Do ghante se akele us band kamre ke andhere mein deewar ko dekhte hue ek ek pal kitna bhari aur lamba guzar raha hoga. Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek kahan se rahun main? Medical expense spiral ne humein road par la diya hai pichle kuch mahino mein. Aaj meri kist bounce ho gayi bank se. Business ya aage ka agla kadam bilkul dimaag mein nahi aa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a warm normalizing line for the mild risk flag, then mirroring the feared consequence of the bounced EMI and business uncertainty (Lens E).
text: Aise achanak sab taraf se kharche aana aur paiso ki pareshani kisi ka bhi dil bitha sakti hai. Yeh jo kist bounce hone ka tension hai aur dukan aage kaise chalegi, yeh soch kar agla rasta poori tarah dhundhla lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rone ka control nahi ho raha
text: Dhundhla hi toh hai. Gaon mein mere kisan baap ne jo chit fund wali savings jod rakhi thi, wo saari aspatal mein beh gayi. Rone ka control nahi ho raha jab unki thaki hui shakal yaad aati hai, unhone sab mere hawale chhod diya tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational pain and guilt connected to the father's sacrificed savings (Lens C).
text: Pita ji ne jis vishwas se apni saari umar ki jamapunji ilaaj par laga di aur parivaar ki naiya tumhare bharose chhod di, aaj unki us qurbani ko yaad karke dil par bojh aur zyada pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bojh is baat ka hai ki unhe kya mooh dikhaunga! Agar biradari mein aur panchayat walo ko pata chala ki mera shehar ka kaam band hone ki kagaar par hai, toh izzat mitti mein mil jayegi. Main kisi ko apna yeh fail hona bata bhi nahi sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Addressing the stigma cue by restating the fear of losing face in the biradari (Lens E), keeping it short and ending with a soft pause.
text: Parivaar ki izzat bachane ka yeh dabaav aur gaon walon ke taano ka darr tumhe is pareshani mein aur bhi zyada akela kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Akele hi toh ghis raha hoon pichle 6 saal se. Na dhang se sona, na theek se khana, bas yahi target tha ki gaon paise bhej sakun aur yahan kaam jama lun. Ab achanak se sab zero ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the deep exhaustion that comes from years of single-handedly carrying the financial duty of the family (C5 + Duty_Based).
text: Mujhe aisa lag raha hai ki saalo se akele is shehar mein parivaar ke liye apni saari zarooratein maar kar jo tumne mehnat ki, us sabka ek medical kharche ki wajah se toot jana tumhe poori tarah andar se thaka chuka hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thak gaya hoon bhaiya, bahut buri tarah thak chuka hoon. Kabhi lagta hai dukan vukan chhod ke bhaag jaun kahin. Par piche papa aur maa ki shakal aage aa jati hai. Kal udhaari walon ke calls aayenge, kya bolunga unhe?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the despair as culturally normal given the migrant breadwinner burden, and separating their worth from the bounced payment.
text: Ek bete ke roop mein akele poore ghar ki zimmedari nibhana aur aisi financial emergency aana, aisi sthiti mein despair aur bhag jaane ka mann karna bilkul swabhavik hai. Tumhara lagatar apne parivaar ke baare mein sochna tumhari achhai hai, aur yeh kist bounce hona tumhari itne saalon ki mehnat ko fail nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mehnat ka kya faida jab aakhir mein khali hath hi rehna hai. Jab chit fund ka paisa tak aspatal me jana pada, tab samajh aaya ki hum chhote logo ka koi sahaara nahi hota system mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a systemic anecdote to normalize medical debt among small business owners from rural backgrounds.
text: Chhote business walon aur gaon se aaye logo ki life mein medical emergencies ke karan achanak aise karze mein doob jana bahut common hai — sirf tumhara yeh haal nahi hai, lekin koi bahar bolega nahi kyunki sab society mein izzat bachaye rakhne ka bojh uthate hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul theek bola aapne. Dukan ke market mein kisi ko bhanak tak nahi lagne di hai maine ki halat aisi hai. Sab sochte hain business badhiya chal raha hai, par andar hi andar kist aur udhaar mujhe daba raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the double burden of managing the debt and maintaining the facade of success (Lens B).
text: Bahar se sabko yeh dikhana ki dukan set hai aur akele andhere mein is udhaari aur kist ke darr ko chupchap bardasht karna, yeh jhooth maintain karna hi apne aap mein ek alag ladaai ban gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dohari ladaai sach mein jaan nikal rahi hai. Raat bhar neend nahi aati, dimaag bas hisaab kitab me uljha rehta hai. Main in sab se theek hona chahta hoon, kya karoon kal ke liye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, immediate grounding options to break the physiological loop of despair before planning tomorrow.
text: Tumne abhi bhi haar nahi maani hai, aur aage ka raasta dhoondhne ki chahat batati hai ki tumhare andar himmat bachi hai. Kal ki kal sochenge, par abhi dimaag shant karne ke liye hum do chhoti cheezein kar sakte hain: ya toh ek glass thanda paani peekar 5 minute ke liye phone side rakh do, ya uth kar apna chehra halke thande pani se dho lo. Tumhe inme se kya theek lag raha hai abhi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Chehra dho leta hoon pehle. Aankhein bhi buri tarah jal rahi hain aur sar mein dard ho raha hai. Paanch minute break lena hi theek rahega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guiding the Seeker step-by-step to execute the grounding exercise.
text: Theek hai, pehle uth kar aaram se chehra dho lo… phir ek glass pani peeyo… aur bas 5 minute bina screen ke shanti se baitho, aaj sirf itna hi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Chehra dho kar paani pee liya hai maine. Thoda sa dimaag par se pahaad jaisa bojh kam lag raha hai abhi. Par wo chit fund wale paise aur us gap ke bare mein soch kar wapas ghabrahat hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a systemic reframe to shift blame away from their business skills onto the unpredictable medical costs in India.
text: Aise emergencies ke time India mein health infrastructure ke itne bade kharchon ki wajah se aache khaase business wale debt mein chale jate hain. Yeh ek medical system ki kami hai jisne achanak tumhara cash flow rok diya, na ki tumhari galti ya kaam ke tareeqe ki kami.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh tasalli hai ki mera kaam toh theek hi chal raha tha bimari aane tak. Ab us bikhre hue kaam ko dobara track par lane ke liye pata nahi kahan se dhage jodne padenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the overwhelming feeling of having to restart after losing accumulated stability (Lens D).
text: Apna barso ka banaya hua base achanak se fisalta hua dekh kar aur usay waapis track par laane ke us lambe safar ka vichaar karna wakai bohot thaka dene wala hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot lamba lagega safar. Par ek raasta ho sakta hai ki jinki dukan se main maal uthata hoon, unse personally mil kar 2 mahine ki mohlat maang lu, aur bank branch jaa kar apni situation bataun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the return of agency and hope as they start planning a way out.
text: Apne suppliers se mohlat maangne aur bank manager ko approach karne ke is practical plan ko sun kar lagta hai ki tumhara darr thoda kam ho raha hai aur tumhare andar wapas haalat sambhalne ki takat aa rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, log kya kahenge us darr se behtar hai ki sachai bank ko formal tareeqe se bata di jaye. Written request dene se kal ko koi badi musibat toh nahi aayegi kam se kam.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a second piece of information normalizing EMI restructuring to lower the perceived threat of the bounce.
text: Bank EMI restructure karwana ya waqt maangna bilkul formal options hote hain, aur isme sharam ki koi baat nahi, zyada tar businesses cash flow rukne par penalty se bachne ke liye yahi approach apnate hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukar hai ye sab normal hota hai. Main diary mein ek rough hisaab likh lunga ki kisko pehle jawab dena hai. Papa ko abhi tension nahi dunga, thoda track par aane ke baad hi bataunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting their continued sense of duty towards protecting their father from stress (Lens B).
text: Ek ek karke diary mein har problem ko sort karna aur papa ko abhi tension se bacha kar rakhne ka yeh faisla, tumhara apne parivaar ke prati woh atoot farz dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rone ka control nahi ho raha
text: Mera farz hi toh hai, main bada beta hoon. Rone ka control nahi ho raha tha jab baat shuru ki thi aapse, laga sab barbaad hai. Par ab pata hai ki mehnat karunga toh is karze se bahar aa jaunga 6 mahine mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the profound shift from utter despair to determined hopefulness.
text: Ek dum sab kuch barbaad lagne se lekar ab aage badhne ka confidence aur ek time frame set karne ka yeh badlav dekh kar waqai bohot rahat mehsoos ho rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas kal dukan par ja kar thoda zameen par khade hoke ladaai ladni hogi. Kisan baap ka beta hoon, fasal kharab hone par mitti thodi chhod dete hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating their resilience using the powerful cultural metaphor they provided about their roots.
text: Apni mitti par aur kisan ki us fitrat par tumhara yeh atoot vishwas ki fasal kharab ho toh nai mehnat ki jati hai, sach mein tumhari sabse badi taqat ban gaya hai is sankat mein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki baat sun kar sach mein aaj thoda wazan kam ho gaya seene se. Us andhere kamre mein akela hi marr raha tha tension se, varna kal toh pata nahi main kaise hi face karta logon ko.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relief from overwhelming panic and the feeling of shared burden (Lens F).
text: Mujhe khushi hai ki us mushkil ghadi mein jab sab taraf sirf andhera aur despair tha, hum is ghutan ko thoda kam karne mein sath mil kar kaam kar paye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal subah jaldi uth kar kaam par jaunga aur jo list banane ka bola tha wo shuru karunga. Nayi umeed se apna plan kal shuru karna hai mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing final closure by reinforcing their readiness for tomorrow.
text: Subah ka waqt waise bhi nayi roshni lata hai, aur fresh dimaag ke mutabiq kal ka din apni terms par shuru karne ka tumhara yeh jazba sach mein taarif ke kabil hai, yaad rakhna tum is mehnat mein akele nahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Bas ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai jisme main khota ja raha hoon. Aangan mein akela baitha hoon, andar bacchon ki aawaz aa rahi hai par himmat nahi ho rahi uth kar unka samna karne ki. Dimaag bilkul sunn ho chuka hai achanak.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feeling of overwhelm and paralysis without pushing for the stressor yet.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki yeh achanak chhayi hui ghutan aur darr tumhe poori tarah se jhakjhor chuki hai, aur is khamoshi mein tum khud ko bilkul akela pa rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Haan, bilkul waisa hi hai. Itne saalon ki mehnat ke baad ab lag raha hai kuch bacha nahi. Phir se wahi ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai aur aisi zillat wali feeling aa rahi hai ki zameen phate aur main sama jaun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of facing the family while carrying this heavy shame.
text: Apne hi aangan mein baith kar is baat ka darr aur zyada darawna lag raha hai ki agar andar bacchon aur ghar walon ke samne gaye toh yeh andar ki bechaini aur zillat chhupegi nahi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Sach toh yeh hai ki aaj bank se call aaya tha. Loan default ho gaya hai. Wahi ICU ke bills jo pichle saal amma ke the, unka karz ab mujhse chukaya nahi ja raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the breadwinner's duty frame of taking on the burden of medical bills.
text: Pariwar ko us medical emergency se nikalne ke liye tumne mukhiya hone ki itni badi zimmedari uthayi, aur aaj wahi zimmedari ek aisi mushkil ban gayi hai jise akele uthana bhari pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Main toh hamesha sabse kehta tha 'sab sambhal lenge', par ab kya sambhalu? Mahine bhar se chupa raha tha tension. Ab default ka call aa gaya toh bas wahi ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai fir se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration of carrying the secret and the resulting exhaustion.
text: Itne dino se sabke samne 'sab theek hai' ka dikhawa karte karte, aur is bojh ko poori khamoshi se sehte hue aakhirkar aaj tumhari taqat jawab de rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Himmat bachi kahan hai. Ab gaon aur biradari mein baat phelgi ki main paise nahi de pa raha toh kya izzat reh jayegi? Kisi ristedaar ya dost ko bhi nahi bata sakta main ye baat.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to the stigma cue with a shorter restatement focused on the relational fear, ending with a soft pause.
text: Biradari aur doston ki nazron mein zindagi bhar ki banayi hui izzat ke gir jane ka yeh darr...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Wahi darr mujhe andar se kha raha hai. Itne saalon ki izzat aur mehnat aise khatam hoti dikh rahi hai. Ab toh sochne samajhne ki shakti bhi nahi bachi, dimaag sunn ho chuka hai poora.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the deep exhaustion of holding up the family's honor and logistics alone.
text: Lagta hai ki poori family ka bojh akele dhote dhote, aur is izzat ko tootne se bachane ki koshish mein tum bilkul exhaust ho chuke ho, jaise ab aur aage ladne ki himmat nahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Bilkul toot gaya hoon bhaisahab. Sach bataun toh gaadi ki chabi samne rakhi hai, man karta hai uthaun aur gaon-khet ki taraf nikal jaun, kahin door jahan koi na pehchane.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the mild risk thought gently, then normalize the commonality of medical debt in the Hindi belt.
text: Jab barso ki mehnat ke baad aisi achanak mushkil aati hai aur recovery ka dawab padta hai, toh sab kuch chhod kar door jane ka khayal aana akelepan mein bohot swabhavik hai. Par yaad rakhna, aaj kal achanak aaye ICU aur hospital ke bhari billon ki wajah se ache khase kamane walo ka bhi financial trap mein phansna aam hai, isme tumhari niyyat ya mehnat ki koi kami nahi thi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Niyyat toh meri hamesha saaf thi. Amma ka ilaaj karna meri zimmedari thi. Par ye bank wale aur log toh bas nateeja dekhte hain na. Ye default ka thappa bahut bhari lag raha hai mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote about breadwinners facing hidden financial struggles to break the stigma.
text: Ghar ke bade hone ke naate, aisi emergency ke baad EMI mein atak jana bohot common hai—yeh sirf tumhara akele ka struggle nahi hai, lekin biradari mein izzat ke darr se koi bhi mard is bare mein khul kar baat nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Sahi bol rahe ho, koi apna mazaak nahi banwana chahta. Par ab main aage kya karoon? Mujhe ye samajh nahi aa raha ki recovery walo ke agli calls se kaise nibtu abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer practical, small steps that fit his persona to regain immediate control.
text: Hum abhi do choti cheezein kar sakte hain jinse turant thodi shanti milegi. Pehla, apne phone ko agle ek ghante ke liye silent kar do taaki lagatar ring ki aawaz se bechaini na badhe. Dusra, bank ke manager ka email ya number nikal kar rakh lo taaki baad mein direct baat ki ja sake. Tumhe inme se kya theek lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Phone ko silent pe daalna zaroori hai. Abhi kisi bhi anjaan number ki ring bajti hai toh meri dhadkan badh jati hai. Bacchon ko lagega papa ko kya ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guide him to execute the chosen suggestion step-by-step.
text: Pehle phone ki setting mein ja kar usko silent pe daal do aur screen ulta karke rakh do... phir wahan aangan se uth kar andar jao aur ek glass paani pee lo... bas itna hi aaj aur abhi ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Phone silent kar diya aur paani bhi pi liya hai. Andar bacche aur patni baithe hain. Kam se kam abhi phone nahi bajega toh main thoda normal dikh paunga unke samne.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his breadwinner duty frame of wanting to appear composed for the family.
text: Apne bacchon ke aage us mazboot pita wali chhavi ko banaye rakhne ke liye yeh thodi si shanti aur samay ka milna abhi bohot zaroori tha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Haan, main bacchon ko ye zillat nahi dikha sakta. Main toh soch raha tha ki thodi zameen girvi rakh dun gaon mein, par usme panchayat involve ho jayegi toh tamasha ban jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe on bank restructuring vs. village gossip.
text: Banking system mein defaults aane par time badhane ya EMI restructure karne ka ek proper process hota hai bank ke saath. Yeh ek financial procedure hai jise directly branch se hal kiya ja sakta hai, yeh koi aisi cheez nahi jiske liye panchayat ya gaon mein baat phelani hi pade.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Acha, matlab bank wale thoda time de sakte hain bina kisi ko bataye? Mujhe toh laga seedha gaon mein ya ghar ke bahar notice chipka jayenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of public shaming that was blocking his options.
text: Ghar ki deewar par notice lagne aur poore pados ya gaon mein tamasha banne ke darr ne hi us ghutan aur tension ko itna bada bana diya tha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Wahi sabse bada darr hai bhaisaab. Izzat chali gayi toh phir kya bachega ek mard ke paas. Par agar bina shor-sharabe ke settlement ka rasta hai bank mein, toh main kal branch ja ke baat kar sakta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational shift from hiding out of fear to stepping up to protect the family.
text: Darr aur badnami ke baare mein sochne ki jagah, ab bank jakar seedhe unse baith kar baat karne ka tumhara faisla, tumhari usi mukhiya wali zimmedari ka agla hissa hai jo pariwar ko bachati aayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Bilkul theek kaha. Jab emergency mein maine zimmedari li thi, tab main peeche nahi hata. Toh ab kyu hatun? Ye bank wali pareshani ka saamna toh mujhe karna hi padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration and shift in his emotional state from paralysis to action.
text: In pichle kuch ghanton mein us khauf aur khamoshi se nikal kar, wapas apne usi purane hausle aur jimmedari lene ki kshamta ki taraf lautna kaafi bada badlaav hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Sannata ab nahi hai dimaag mein. Bas ab mind mein calculation chal rahi hai ki unse time kaise mangu. EMI ko half karne ka puchhunga. Jo hoga dekha jayega, ab isse bhagunga nahi main.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his renewed sense of duty and strength.
text: Pariwar ke liye kabhi na bhagne wale us mazboot insaan ki taqat wapas laut aayi hai, jo ab khud aage badh kar samasya ka hal nikalne ko taiyar hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Mukhiya hone ka yahi toh arth hai ki 'sab sambhal lenge'. Meri patni agar achanak kuch sunegi toh thoda ghabrayegi, par shayad ab mujhe use yeh baat thodi bahut bata deni chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational importance of breaking his isolation by letting his wife in.
text: Apni patni se yeh sach saanjha karne ka vichar, us akelepan ki deewar ko tod kar apni life partner ko bhi is mushkil ghadi mein apne sath khada karne ka ek aham kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Sahi kaha, akela bahar aangan mein ghabrate rehna kisi masle ka hal nahi hai. Andar chalta hoon, baccho ke samne nahi par usko akele mein baitha ke thoda hint deta hoon abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence dissipating as he prepares to face his wife.
text: Ghar walon ke samne apna darr chhupane ka wo bhari dawab ab kam ho gaya hai, isliye andar ja kar unka samna karna aur unhe halaat batana ab utna mushkil nahi lag raha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Thoda toh mushkil lagega bolna, par ye chupa kar rakhne wala bojh usse zyada bhari tha. Yeh ICU aur loan sab hamari hi toh grahasti ka hissa hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the shift from solitary burden to shared duty.
text: Akele saari zimmedari ka pahaad uthane wali aadat ko tod kar, apne pariwar ko hi apni taqat aur samarthan banane ka yeh vichar sach mein bohot samajhdari bhara hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Aapne baith kar suna aur himmat di, uske liye shukriya. Main ja raha hoon ab andar. Unhe bolunga ki thodi financial problem aayi hai, par hum log isko mil kar sambhal lenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the time elapsed and the positive shift as he returns to his family.
text: Bahut der us aangan ke andhere mein akele rehne ke baad, ab aakhirkar unke paas wapas laut kar ek nayi shuruaat aur taiyari karna sach mein ek bada kadam hai. Dhyan rakhna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag blank hai
text: Kuch samajh nahi aa raha, main bilkul breakdown kar gaya hoon aur dimaag blank hai. Aisa lag raha hai jaise sab khatam ho raha hai, bas ek ajeeb sa darr lag raha hai andar hi andar. Is emotional flooding mein mujhe rona aa raha hai aur saans ghut rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the feeling quality of panic and overwhelm (Lens F) as required by Sequential Coping, without probing for the stressor.
text: Aise achanak se sab kuch haath se nikalta hua mehsoos hona aur andar itni ghabrahat bhari hona sach mein bahut dara dene wala tajurba hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag blank hai
text: Haan, dimaag blank hai poori tarah. Main poori zindagi sab akele handle karta aaya, kisi ko pata tak nahi chalne diya ki kya pareshani hai, par ab lagta hai jaise jameen khisak rahi hai pairo tale.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the duration of his solitary struggle (Lens D) to validate how jarring this sudden loss of control feels.
text: Jo insaan saalon se hamesha akele hi har takleef sambhalta aaya ho, uske liye aaj achanak khud ko itna bebus aur akela mehsoos karna aur bhi zyada bhari padta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Asal mein pichle mahine bhai ke accident mein meri saari jama-poonji chali gayi. Usko theek karane mein maine apna sab laga diya, socha tha aage dekh lenge, par abhi toh kuch bhi theek nahi lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the relational sacrifice (Lens C) as the stressor naturally surfaced, acknowledging his dedication to his brother.
text: Apne bhai ki jaan bachane ke liye apna sab kuch bina soche dao par laga dena aapke pyar ko dikhata hai, par uske baad ka yeh naya bojh akele uthana andar se tod raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh, aur upar se gaon wale sahukaar ka karz pehle se chal raha tha. Aaj bank ka EMI bounce alert aaya mobile pe, usko dekh kar bas dum ghut gaya ki ab main kya jawab dunga sabko.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the feared consequence (Lens E) regarding the mounting debt and facing others.
text: Hospital ke kharche aur sahukaar ke purane karz ke beech, yeh EMI bounce ka notification is darr ko aur badha raha hai ki logon ke aage is halaat ka samna kaise kiya jayega...

speaker: Seeker
text: Kisi ko bata bhi toh nahi sakta. Biradari mein kya izzat reh jayegi agar logon ko pata chala ki main apna ghar nahi chala pa raha. Bahut sharam aati hai, society wale taane marenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Applied stigma protocol: a shorter restatement focusing on the role/duty burden (Lens B), ending with a soft pause.
text: Samaj aur biradari ke saamne is mukhiya wali izzat ko banaye rakhne ka bojh bahut bhari hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Kabhi kabhi lagta hai sab chhod-chhad ke aisi jagah chala jaaun jahan koi na ho, ya bas ye zindagi hi khatam ho jaye. Kam se kam ye darr aur roz ke EMI messages toh nahi aayenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Addressed moderate risk flag by mirroring the deep emotional exhaustion (Lens F) and ending with a safety check.
text: Is roz-roz ki ghutan aur badhte dabaav se hamesha ke liye chhutkara paane ka khayal aana, itni gehri thakan ka nateeja hai. Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag blank hai
text: Main theek hoon. Aisa koi galat kadam nahi uthaunga kyunki mere peeche biwi bacchon ka kya hoga? Bas dimaag itna thak gaya hai aur dimaag blank hai ki ab kahan se laaun paise main in sab ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asked a single question to explore the core conflict behind the exhaustion now that safety is confirmed.
text: Apne parivaar ko surakshit rakhne ka aapka yeh faisla aapki asli taqat dikhata hai... par abhi is waqt, is thakan mein sabse zyada pareshan karne wali chinta konsi lag rahi hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sabse zyada darr is baat ka hai ki poora parivaar bikhar jayega. Main sabko jode rakhta hoon. Agar main EMI aur sahukaar ka paisa nahi de paya, toh mere bacchon ke future ka kya hoga? Main poori tarah fass gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the core feeling of EXHAUSTION tied to his duty as the breadwinner clashing with financial impossibility.
text: Lagta hai ki is 'mukhiya' hone ki jimmedari ko nibhaate-nibhaate, aap is bhari karz ke beech khud ko poori tarah se fasa hua aur thaka hua mehsoos kar rahe hain, jahan bacchon ke bhavishya ki chinta sabse bhari pad rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi pakda aapne. Din bhar machine ki tarah kaam karta hoon, par aamdani se dugne toh kharche aur byaaj ho gaye hain. Andar se aisi thakan hai jo kisi neend se poori nahi hoti, bas subah uth kar wahi boj utha leta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated his deep exhaustion as a natural response to the crushing weight of his duties and separated his worth from the financial notices.
text: Is tarah ki gehri thakan aur akelepan ko mehsoos karna bilkul swabhavik hai jab aap par ghar, hospital aur karz teeno ka itna bada bojh ho. Aapne apni jama-poonji parivaar ke liye lagai, yeh aapki himmat hai, aur ek EMI bounce hona aapko kamzor insaan nahi banata.

speaker: Seeker
text: Baat toh theek hai, lekin practical reality toh wahi hai na. Jeb mein paise nahi hain aur notice aane wala hai. Aise mein kabhi kabhi bathroom mein akele mein rona aata hai, par bahar aakar muskura deta hoon taaki ghar wale darr na jayein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used self-disclosure to normalize the systemic pattern of male breadwinners hiding their tears and carrying the financial burden silently.
text: Hamare samaj mein ghar ke bade mardon ke liye yeh akele sab sehna aur chup kar rona bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki ummeed ki jati hai ki aadmi kabhi kamzor nahi padta aur har dikkat khud suljha leta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag blank hai
text: Bilkul yahi hota hai hamare sath. Bas ye sahukaar aur bank ke chakkar mein aakar dimaag blank hai. Aap hi batao ab kya karoon main? Aage ka koi raasta hai kya is phase se nikalne ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided two concrete, quick actionable steps to manage the immediate threat of the bounced EMI and sahukaar without adding new financial obligations.
text: Aapne itni himmat dikhai hai aaj yeh baat karke. Abhi ke liye do chhote kadam soch sakte hain: ya toh bank ke customer care ko phone karke bhai ki medical emergency samjha kar thoda time maangna, ya phir kal subah sirf sahukaar se akele milkar byaaj dene ke liye thodi mohlat tay karna. Kya inmein se kuch abhi theek lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahukaar ke paas subah jana theek nahi hoga, wo subah subah tamasha kar dega izzat ka sawal hai. Par bank wale option pe try kar sakta hoon. Medical papers dikha dunga toh shayad maan jayein aur thoda waqt de dein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walked the Seeker step-by-step through the process of contacting the bank, keeping the task small and manageable for the next day.
text: Yeh ek bahut accha faisla hai. Pehle ek paper par bank ka toll-free number aur apna loan account number likh kar rakh lo... phir kal subah shanti se unhe call karke accident ki situation aur medical emergency samjhao... bas itna hi aaj ke liye plan karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, medical bills aur discharge papers bhi nikal kar saamne rakh leta hoon abhi. Kam se kam bank ka penalty na lage toh thoda bojh toh kam hoga mere kandhon se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided a systemic reframe on banking grace periods to relieve his internal sense of failure and normalize the process.
text: Aksar logon ko pata nahi hota, par banking system mein medical emergency ke halaat mein grace period dene aur penalty maaf karne ka pravdhan hota hai, yeh ek standard aarthik prakriya hai jiska fayda uthana apka poora haq hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Acha? Yeh sun kar thodi shanti mili mujhe. Mujhe laga tha bas bank wale seedha notice danda lekar aayenge ghar pe. Par wo sahukaar toh aise nahi manega na, uska kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored his ongoing sense of duty (Lens B), recognizing that he is still carrying the weight of multiple financial responsibilities.
text: Bank ki taraf se thodi rahat ki umeed dikhne ke baad bhi, ek mukhiya ke roop mein sahukaar ke karz ko chukane ki chinta abhi bhi apni jagah poori tarah kayam hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag blank hai
text: Haan, sahukaar ka byaaj toh roz meter ki tarah bhagta hai. Uski baat sunkar hi dimaag blank hai mera. Par aaj kam se kam bank wala option sunkar thodi saans aayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the feared consequence (Lens E) regarding the aggressive nature of local money lenders.
text: Us byaaj ke tezi se badhte jaane aur sahukaar ke dabaav ka sochna hi andar tak dara deta hai ki kahin cheezein phir se poori tarah hath se na nikal jayein...

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi darr toh hamesha rehta hai, par ab main ek sath sab kuch theek nahi kar sakta. Aaj bank ka prepare kar liya, sahukaar ke liye parso kisi apne khaas se akele mein baat karke dekhta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the shift in focus and boundaries (Lens D), acknowledging his choice to pace the problem-solving over time instead of all at once.
text: Ek mukammal pahad jaisi pareshani ko ek hi waqt mein na dekh kar, usko chhote hisson mein bant kar kal aur parso ke liye tayari karna... yeh sach mein ek samajhdari bhari shuruaat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Waqai, jab aapse baat shuru ki thi tab lag raha tha jese heart attack aa jayega itne panic se, par ab lag raha hai ki kuch toh rasta zaroor niklega. Bhai ki recovery ho rahi hai, wahi sabse badi baat hai mere liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the relational core (Lens C) of his resilience, validating that his brother's survival is his true wealth.
text: Darr aur panic ke us toofan ke beech se guzar kar, ab aapka poora dhyaan aur sukoon is baat par aa gaya hai ki aapka bhai ab surakshit hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Paise toh insaan mehnat karke dobara kama lega, par zindagi thodi wapas aati hai. Aaj se apni soch ko thoda shant rakhna padega, tabhi parivaar ko aage le ja paunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored his duty-bound nature (Lens B), highlighting the quiet strength it takes to keep pushing forward despite the odds.
text: Mushkil halaat mein apni soch ko naye sire se dhalna aur sabse pehle apne parivaar ke bhavishya ko aage rakhna aapki usi purani taqat aur zimmedari ko darshata hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, bas is waqt thodi thakan si mehsoos ho rahi hai pure jism mein. Soch raha hoon thodi der sab band karke aaram kar loon taaki kal fresh dimaag se bank mein baat kar sakun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Suggested a highly accessible, comforting physical action for immediate relief before sleep, aligning with his exhausted state.
text: Is lambi aur thakane wali baat-cheet ke baad aaram karna bahut zaroori hai, kya abhi phone rakhne ke baad ek glass pani peekar das minute shanti se letna theek rahega aapke liye?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, wahi karunga abhi. Ek badi chinta toh kam hui hai dimaag se. Aapne meri baat suni aur bina judge kiye samjha, uske liye bahut bahut shukriya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the relational frame (Lens C) one last time to validate that sharing his burden was a courageous act for his family's well-being.
text: Aapko apni is takleef ko baant kar thodi rahat milna, khud aapki apni himmat hai jo apne apno ke liye har haal mein ek behtar rasta dhoondhna chahti thi...
